name: pr_alc_tms_sd
drl:
rule "R0"
salience 10
agenda-group "gb"
when
    Q($t : tag)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    T1($a : k)
    not Q()
then
    insertLogical(new Q($a));
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
rule "WQ"
salience -5
when
    $q : Q($t : tag)
then
end
rule "WN"
salience -10
when
    not Q()
then
end
_finding: TMS x late-continue recon: self-defeat (NOT-lane) cell. R4's insertLogical(Q) breaks its own `not Q()` (self-defeat, bit1) while the same RHS pushes gb; gb's R0 matches Q(), so its staged insert makes higher=true and the halt-check outcome hinges on whether the self-defeat retraction of Q coalesces before R0's force-eval. Pins the bit1 lane's landing across the late-continue region.
